quick_skim.title: Hierarchical Variational Kalman Filtering
quick_skim.abstract: Traditional variational Kalman filtering with unknown noise statistics suffers from inconsistent process covariance estimation and slow convergence speed, limiting its practical utility. To address these issues, we introduce a surrogate variable representing the process-noise-free state, which enables explicit modeling and inference of process noise statistics. In addition, we reformulate the conventional coordinate ascent variation inference (CAVI) as a marginalized maximum a posteriori problem, followed by a single-step hyperparameter fitting. This reformulation obviates the need for multiple inner iterations inherent to CAVI and decouples the design of the covariance tracking filters. Consequently, this architecture permits the deployment of higher-order filters for covariance tracking and enables sliding-window hyperparameter estimation. Notably, when this window encompasses all historical data, the covariance tracking estimator intrinsically operates as a zero-phase filter. Numerical simulations validate the theoretical framework, demonstrating the enhanced convergence speed and superior estimation accuracy compared with existing methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: hierarchical variational Kalman filtering for data assimilation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于数据同化的分层变分卡尔曼滤波
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于数据同化的分层变分卡尔曼滤波
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于数据同化的分层变分卡尔曼滤波
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a hierarchical variational Kalman filtering method that improves covariance estimation and convergence speed for data assimilation tasks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传统变分卡尔曼滤波在噪声统计未知时协方差估计不一致且收敛慢的问题，提出一种分层变分卡尔曼滤波方法。通过引入代理变量显式建模过程噪声，并重新表述为边缘最大后验问题，消除了内部循环，实现了更稳定快速的协方差跟踪。该方法可部署高阶滤波器，适用于数据同化等应用场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对传统变分卡尔曼滤波在噪声统计未知时协方差估计不一致且收敛慢的问题，提出一种分层变分卡尔曼滤波方法。通过引入代理变量显式建模过程噪声，并重新表述为边缘最大后验问题，消除了内部循环，实现了更稳定快速的协方差跟踪。该方法可部署高阶滤波器，适用于数据同化等应用场景。
